message:
fix(tools): add type annotation for Windows build compatibility

The `expected_inode` variable needs an explicit `Option<u64>` type
annotation because on Windows the `#[cfg(not(unix))]` branch returns
bare `None`, and the compiler cannot infer the type parameter since
the Unix branch providing `u64` via `m.ino()` is compiled out.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
